note: Supervised pre-activation greedy residual network. The stem and each residual block are fit by closed-form ridge regression, the block output is linear, and the nonlinear activation is applied only when the next block consumes that state. Head mode: ridge-head. Block target: task-gradient. Target code: onehot. Update mode: residual. Shrinkage: 1.0. Hidden normalization between blocks: False.
